items.summary: In the backend trading loop (tradingLoop()), replace all Debug.print stubs for order placement with actual placeOrder() calls to the ICDex canister at 'jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai'. Each order (both BUY and SELL) must use a fixed quantity of 2 ICP (represented as 200_000_000 e8s). Place all orders in the newly computed grid. Do not implement cancelOrder or grid repositioning in this step.
